reviews.comment:
Siempre paramos en estas estaciones de servicio cuando viajamos porque tienen buena atención, sanitarios limpios y shopping completo..aunque lo más común es q haya muuucha gente para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
We always stop at these gas stations when we travel because they have good service, clean restrooms, and a full shopping area...although it's usually very crowded waiting to fill up.

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Cada vez que paso por esa estación, están descargando combustible,  se forma un embotellamiento inmenso,  y  termino perdiendo más de una hora de viaje.  Debieran prever que en temporada circula mucha gente.

(Translated by Google)
Every time I pass that station, they're unloading fuel, creating a massive traffic jam, and I end up losing more than an hour of my trip. They should anticipate the high volume of traffic during peak season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBa09qVnFBRRAB
